title.en: ELECTRIC DIGITAL DATA PROCESSING (computer systems based on specific computational models G06N)
Details not covered by groups G06F3/00 - G06F13/00 and G06F21/00 (architectures of general purpose stored program computers G06F15/76)

Generating or distributing clock signals or signals derived directly therefrom
Constructional details or arrangements
Means for limiting or controlling the pin/gate ratio
Resetting means
Power supply means, e.g. regulation thereof (for memories G11C)

Input arrangements for transferring data to be processed into a form capable of being handled by the computer; Output arrangements for transferring data from processing unit to output unit, e.g. interface arrangements
{Specific input/output arrangements not covered by G06F3/01 - G06F3/16 (other optical apparatus G02B27/00)}
{Digital input from or digital output to memories of the shift register type}
Input arrangements or combined input and output arrangements for interaction between user and computer (G06F3/16 takes precedence)
Digital input using the sampling of an analogue quantity at regular intervals of time {, input from a/d converter or output to d/a converter}
Digital input from, or digital output to, record carriers {, e.g. RAID, emulated record carriers or networked record carriers}
Digital output to typewriters
Digital output to print unit {, e.g. line printer, chain printer}
Digital output to plotter {; Cooperation and interconnection of the plotter with other functional units}

Methods or arrangements for data conversion without changing the order or content of the data handled

for shifting, e.g. justifying, scaling, normalising {(digital stores in which the information is moved stepwise, e.g. shift-registers G11C19/00; digital stores in which the information circulates G11C21/00)}
for changing the speed of data flow, i.e. speed regularising {or timing, e.g. delay lines, FIFO buffers; over- or underrun control therefor (G06F7/78 takes precedence)}
Methods or arrangements for processing data by operating upon the order or content of the data handled (logic circuits H03K19/00)
Comparing digital values (G06F7/06, {G06F7/22,} G06F7/38 take precedence)
Arrangements for sorting, selecting, merging, or comparing data on individual record carriers
Arrangements for sorting or merging computer data on continuous record carriers, e.g. tape, drum, disc
Methods or arrangements for performing computations using exclusively denominational number representation, e.g. using binary, ternary, decimal representation
Random or pseudo-random number generators

Methods or arrangements for performing computations using a digital non-denominational number representation, i.e. number representation without radix; Computing devices using combinations of denominational and non-denominational quantity representations {, e.g. using difunction pulse trains, STEELE computers, phase computers (conversion of digital data to or from non-denominational form H03M5/00, H03M7/00)}
Selecting or encoding within a word the position of one or more bits having a specified value, e.g. most or least significant one or zero detection, priority encoders {(with shifting G06F5/01)}
Arrangements for rearranging, permuting or selecting data according to predetermined rules, independently of the content of the data

Transformation of program code

using wired connections, e.g. plugboards
using record carriers containing only program instructions (G06F9/06 takes precedence)
using stored programs, i.e. using an internal store of processing equipment to receive or retain programs

{protecting against parasitic influences, e.g. noise, temperatures}
{Error avoidance (G06F11/07 and subgroups take precedence)}
{Identification (G06F11/2289 takes precedence)}
{Reliability or availability analysis}

by checking the correct order of processing (G06F11/08 - G06F11/26 take precedence; monitoring patterns of pulse trains H03K5/19)
Monitoring

Protection against unauthorised use of memory {or access to memory}
Protection against loss of memory contents {(contains no material, see G06F11/00)}

Interconnection of, or transfer of information or other signals between, memories, input/output devices or central processing units (interface circuits for specific input/output devices G06F3/00 {; multiprogram control therefor  G06F9/46}; multiprocessor systems  G06F15/16 )
Program control for peripheral devices (G06F13/14 - G06F13/42 take precedence)
